findings.claim_excerpt: increase is attributable primarily to the consolidation of ININ from late November

follow_up_questions.text: If 'acquisition_completed' was completed at November, what specific operational mechanism produced the metric impact already by Q4 2024? Provide the transmission steps.
Quantify the integration, restructuring, or transition costs absorbed during the same period; reconcile them against the asserted positive impact.
How long did comparable Nordic peers take to realise similar impact from the same action type? Please cite at least one precedent.
Show the cash flow path supporting this impact: working capital change, receivables, and operating cash flow for the same period.

findings.headline: Qben Infra AB (FY2024 standalone attack): 'acquisition_completed' impact attributed to current period appears mechanical (IFRS consolidation language detected); lag=0Q is accounting, not synergy.

sentence_context.prev: Fourth quarter of 2024 (October–December) Net sales and earnings Net sales for the fourth quarter totalled SEK 292 million (235), up 24 per cent.
sentence_context.match: The increase is attributable primarily to the consolidation of ININ from late November as well as completed acquisitions.
sentence_context.next: EBITA for the fourth quarter was SEK -114 million (43) and adjusted EBITA was SEK -19 million The decrease is attributable to negative earnings for ININ and the acquisition of ICP as well as transaction costs in conjunction with the acquisition of ININ and the listing of the company’s shares (see below).

follow_up_questions.text: Management describes 'growth' qualitatively, yet supporting metrics (revenue_yoy_pct=-2.0) move against it. Which specific events explain the gap?
Was the narrative engineered by reclassification or by adjustments (e.g., 'continuing operations', 'adjusted EBITDA')? Provide the reconciliation.
Compare the same metric YoY change against at least two closest listed peers. Is the gap company-specific or industry-wide?
List the underlying segment metrics that would prove the narrative. Were they disclosed at the same granularity as last year?

findings.headline: Qben Infra AB (FY2024 standalone attack): 'growth' narrative cited 34 times, but supporting metrics move the opposite way (revenue_yoy_pct=-2.0).

findings.claim: SLAM Jernbaneteknikk AS is a specialist in rail signalling and electrification in Norway
findings.headline: Qben Infra AB (FY2024 standalone attack): claim 'SLAM Jernbaneteknikk AS is a specialist in rail signalling and electrification in Norway' -- triangulation = doffin=not_found, brreg=confirms, ted=not_found; derived severity = critical.
findings.claim_excerpt: SLAM Jernbaneteknikk AS, a specialist in rail signalling
findings.claim_excerpt_matched_term: SLAM Jernbaneteknikk AS, a specialist in rail signalling

pending_falsification_questions.text: Does the entity appear as a named subcontractor on prime contracts in the claimed domain?

doffin.narrative: Doffin returned 0 search hits and 0 confirmed awards for SLAM Jernbaneteknikk AS. For a Norwegian state-rail-adjacent specialist this is the canonical registry; absence is a weak-to-moderate refute. Subcontractor chains, private-sector clients, and consortium framework agreements remain as alternative hypotheses that this tap cannot test.

brreg.narrative: BRREG resolved 'SLAM Jernbaneteknikk AS' to orgnr 926465252 'SLAM JERNBANETEKNIKK AS' (match=exact+naics, 8 candidates inspected from the top page; BRREG free-text search reports 433581 dataset entries containing any of the name tokens). Founded 2021-01-13 (~5.4 years old). Reports 36 employees. NAICS=42.120 (Bygging av jernbaner og undergrunnsbaner).

candidates_summary.navn: IGLAND & NYHAVEN SLAM OG RØRSPYLING AS
SLAM OG SPYLESERVICE INDRE ØSTFOLD AS

ted.narrative: TED returned 0 notices where SLAM Jernbaneteknikk AS appears as a winner. TED carries only EU-directive-threshold awards (~NOK 45M for works); a smaller-scale supplier may legitimately have no TED footprint. This is weaker than Doffin absence.

payload_summary.ted_threshold_caveat: TED carries EU-directive-threshold notices only (~NOK 45M for works, ~NOK 1.4-2M for goods/services). Absence on TED is weaker evidence than absence on Doffin.

sentence_context.prev: Before the merger in 2024, ININ carried out several key acquisitions that further strengthen our position as a specialised operator in the Nordic infrastructure services market.
sentence_context.match: SLAM Jernbaneteknikk AS, a specialist in rail signalling and electrification in Norway, and Banefjell AS, an established player in track maintenance, concrete renovation and signal systems, were acquired in March.
sentence_context.next: A declaration of intent was signed regarding an acquisition of Trasé AS, a company that specialises in transport infrastructure.

findings.claim: Banefjell AS is an established player in track maintenance, concrete renovation and signal in Norway
findings.headline: Qben Infra AB (FY2024 standalone attack): claim 'Banefjell AS is an established player in track maintenance, concrete renovation and signal in Norway' -- triangulation = doffin=confirms, brreg=confirms, ted=confirms; derived severity = info.

doffin.narrative: Doffin returned 4 confirmed prime-contract awards to Banefjell AS, 2 post-acquisition and 2 pre-acquisition. This is consistent with the claim.

Founded 2014-07-30 (~11.8 years old). Reports 60 employees. NAICS=42.120 (Bygging av jernbaner og undergrunnsbaner).

findings.claim: Team Bygg AS provides comprehensive resources for executing real estate projects in the Norwegian housing market
findings.headline: Qben Infra AB (FY2024 standalone attack): claim 'Team Bygg AS provides comprehensive resources for executing real estate projects in the Norwegian housing market' -- triangulation = doffin=refutes, brreg=refutes, ted=not_found; derived severity = critical.

doffin.narrative: Doffin returned 5 text-search hit(s) but none had Team Bygg AS in the official awardedNames field. The search space is noisy (name collisions) but the entity itself does not appear as a winner.

brreg.narrative: BRREG resolved 'Team Bygg AS' to orgnr 984738161 'TEAM BYGG AS' (match=exact, 8 candidates inspected from the top page; BRREG free-text search reports 440102 dataset entries containing any of the name tokens). Founded 2002-06-21 (~23.9 years old). NAICS=68.120 (Utvikling og salg av byggeprosjekter). NAICS prefix MISMATCH: expected 41*, got 68.120. The entity exists but operates in a different industry than claimed.

ted.narrative: TED returned 0 notices where Team Bygg AS appears as a winner. TED carries only EU-directive-threshold awards (~NOK 45M for works); a smaller-scale supplier may legitimately have no TED footprint. This is weaker than Doffin absence.

payload_summary.ted_threshold_caveat: TED carries EU-directive-threshold notices only (~NOK 45M for works, ~NOK 1.4-2M for goods/services). Absence on TED is weaker evidence than absence on Doffin.

findings.claim: Nordnes Narvik AS is a key player in railway construction in North Norway
findings.headline: Qben Infra AB (FY2024 standalone attack): claim 'Nordnes Narvik AS is a key player in railway construction in North Norway' -- triangulation = doffin=partial, brreg=refutes, ted=not_found; derived severity = critical.

doffin.narrative: Doffin returned 1 confirmed award(s) to Nordnes Narvik AS, but 1 of them predate the acquisition. The post-acquisition activity that would substantiate organic growth is absent.

brreg.narrative: BRREG resolved 'Nordnes Narvik AS' to orgnr 991683011 'NORDNES NARVIK AS' (match=exact, 8 candidates inspected from the top page; BRREG free-text search reports 433917 dataset entries containing any of the name tokens). Founded 2007-09-03 (~18.7 years old). Reports 6 employees. NAICS=47.520 (Detaljhandel med jernvarer, byggevarer, fargevarer og glass). NAICS prefix MISMATCH: expected 42.12*, got 47.520. The entity exists but operates in a different industry than claimed.

sentence_context.prev: In September, we expanded our capacity in soil preparation and high-voltage networks through the acquisition of Skyttermoen Anlegg AS, and strengthened our presence in property development and major housing projects in Norway through Qben’s mid-year acquisition of Team Bygg AS.
sentence_context.match: Early in 2025, we continued our expansion with the acquisition of Nordnes Narvik AS, a rail specialist in northern Norway, in January.
sentence_context.next: That same month, we signed a letter of intent to acquire Testpartner Gruppen, which will strengthen our expertise in testing, inspection and certification (TIC).
